data.label: We are Canada
data.nodeData:
System Prompt: You are writing a public-facing synthesis report. You must attribute every claim to its upstream webpage. In the final report, include a **Sources** section that lists each source by name and prints its URL on its own line (copy URLs from the extracts below). When you use facts from a section, name that source in prose (e.g. "According to the Ontario government page…").

Write a concise report titled "We are Canada" that synthesizes the two Canadian webpage extracts below for a general audience. Use clear Markdown headings.

## Ontario government

{$ontario_gov}

## Canada statutory holidays

{$canada_holidays}

End the report with:

## Sources

- Ontario government: (title and URL from the Ontario extract above)
- Canada statutory holidays: (title and URL from the holidays extract above)
